/// Gradient Descent Optimizers.

use crate::autodiff::Variable;

pub struct SGD {
    lr: f64,
    params: Vec<Variable>,
}

impl SGD {
    pub fn new(params: Vec<Variable>, lr: f64) -> Self {
        Self { params, lr }
    }

    pub fn step(&mut self) {
        for param in &mut self.params {
            // W = W - lr * grad
            // Logic requires tensor subtraction, implementing manually for now
            // In full version: param.data -= param.grad * lr
        }
    }

    pub fn zero_grad(&mut self) {
        // Reset gradients to zero
    }
}
